Economy Objectives: Increase employment with support from investments in transportation infrastructure improvements, technology improvements, and regional connectivity
Performance Measures: Number of Urbanized Area's funded and completed projects, and number of jobs supported by transportation investments

Economy Objectives: Maintain or increase Access to Jobs Score for block groups with above average unemployment by 2025
Performance Measures: Access to Job Score for block groups with above average unemployment

Economy Objectives: Increase the number of truck parking facilities in Champaign County from seven to ten, or expand the square footage of the truck parking areas by 40 percent by 2025
Data/Tools: FHWA Freight Management and Operations ,  IDOT Truck Parking Information Management System (TPIMS), Find Truck Service , Google maps
Performance Measures: Number or square footage of truck parking facilities in Champaign County
